destinations.name: Santorini, Greece
destinations.description: A volcanic island sculpted by ancient eruptions into one of the most iconic seascapes on earth. The caldera's geometry — stark white against infinite Aegean blue — offers a visual silence that no photograph can fully capture. Santorini is not merely visited; it is absorbed.
destinations.essenceText: Where volcanic drama meets Aegean infinity.

landmarks.title: Oia Clifftop
landmarks.description: The world-famous blue-domed village perched on the northern caldera edge — best experienced at dawn before the crowds arrive.

landmarks.title: Akrotiri Ruins
landmarks.description: A Minoan Bronze Age settlement preserved beneath volcanic ash — often called the 'Pompeii of the Aegean' for its extraordinary state of preservation.

landmarks.title: Red Beach
landmarks.description: Dramatic blood-red volcanic cliffs tower over a secluded pebble shore — accessible only by boat or a steep coastal path reserved for the persistent.

seasonsHighlights.description: Warm Aegean temperatures, minimal crowds, vibrant wildflowers blooming across the caldera rim — the island at its most authentic.
Golden afternoon light, cooler evenings ideal for cliff-side dining, and the sea still warm from three months of summer sun.

destinations.name: Kyoto, Japan
destinations.description: Ancient temples, traditional gardens, and the essence of Japanese culture. Every corner reveals a new perspective, inviting the ethereal voyager to pause and witness poetic landscapes frozen in time.

seasonsHighlights.description: Kyoto is blanketed in pale pink blossoms, creating an ethereal and fleeting landscape.
Vibrant red and gold maple leaves frame the ancient temple architecture perfectly.

destinations.name: Amalfi Coast
destinations.description: Dramatic cliffs, colorful villages, and Mediterranean charm. The vertical alignment of the towns offers an unparalleled vantage over the azure waters.

landmarks.title: Positano Heights
landmarks.description: Cascading pastel villas clinging to rugged cliffs.

landmarks.title: Ravello Gardens
landmarks.description: Spectacular cliffside views of the Tyrrhenian Sea.

landmarks.title: Amalfi Duomo
landmarks.description: Majestic Byzantine architecture in the town square.

seasonsHighlights.description: Warm sun, vibrant boat rides to Capri, and bustling limoncello cafes.
The perfect balance of cooling sea breezes and calm romantic terraces.

destinations.name: Swiss Alps
destinations.description: Crystalline peaks, absolute silence, and untouched snowscapes. Experience the pinnacle of European alpine luxury.

landmarks.title: The Matterhorn
landmarks.description: The world's most iconic alpine spire.

landmarks.title: Lake Geneva
landmarks.description: Pristine waters reflecting the snow-capped summits.

landmarks.title: Zermatt Valley
landmarks.description: Car-free sanctuary hidden deep in the mountains.

seasonsHighlights.description: Powder skiing, fondue by giant hearths, and silent glacial treks.
Wildflower pastures and crystal clear high-altitude lakes.

tours.name: Golden Triangle Odyssey
tours.overviewDescription: Explore Delhi, Agra, and Jaipur in a mesmerizing journey.
tours.overviewExtended: A comprehensive journey through India's rich history, diving deep into majestic forts, romantic palaces, and bustling bazaars.

itinerary.title: Day 1: Arrive Delhi
itinerary.description: Arrival, check-in and welcome dinner experience.

itinerary.title: Day 2: Taj Mahal at Sunrise
itinerary.description: A magical morning viewing the Taj Mahal in Agra.

sightseeing.title: Taj Mahal
sightseeing.description: A marble mausoleum and world wonder

testimonials.quote: An unforgettable experience from start to finish!
testimonials.author: John Doe

testimonials.quote: The guides were highly knowledgeable and helpful.
testimonials.author: Jane Smith

tours.name: Greek Islands: The Curator's Path
tours.overviewDescription: A nine-day private archipelago journey across Santorini, Mykonos, and Milos — curated for guests who demand visual impact without compromise.
tours.overviewExtended: Sail between islands on a private catamaran. Sleep in caldera-edge suites carved into volcanic rock. Dine at tables that hang over the Aegean. Every transfer, every reservation, every moment of silence is orchestrated in advance. This is Greece without the noise.

itinerary.title: Day 1–2: Athens Arrival & Acropolis Private Access
itinerary.description: VIP transfer to a boutique hotel in Plaka. Private after-hours access to the Acropolis with a personal archaeologist — the site illuminated only by moonlight.
itinerary.schedule: 14:00 Airport transfer · 17:00 Hotel check-in · 21:00 Acropolis private access

itinerary.title: Day 3–5: Santorini Caldera Suite
itinerary.description: Helicopter transfer to Santorini. Three nights in a cave suite on the caldera rim. Private sunset sailing, Akrotiri archaeological preview, and a volcanic hot-spring circuit.
itinerary.schedule: 09:00 Helicopter depart · 10:30 Arrive Santorini · 18:00 Sunset sail

itinerary.title: Day 6–7: Milos & Secret Beaches
itinerary.description: Catamaran crossing to Milos — the island of a thousand beaches. Full-day exploration of Sarakiniko lunar landscape and Kleftiko sea caves by private speedboat.
itinerary.schedule: 08:00 Depart by catamaran · 11:00 Arrive Milos · 14:00 Kleftiko caves speedboat

itinerary.title: Day 8–9: Mykonos & Departure
itinerary.description: Optional final night in a private villa in Little Venice, Mykonos. Concludes with private transfer to Athens for international departure.
itinerary.schedule: Morning leisure · 15:00 Ferry to Mykonos · Day 9: 12:00 Athens flight transfer

sightseeing.title: Caldera Sunset Sail
sightseeing.description: Private catamaran circumnavigation of the Santorini caldera timed exactly for golden-hour descent.

sightseeing.title: Akrotiri Archaeological Tour
sightseeing.description: Private guided tour of the Minoan ruins with an expert archaeologist before the site opens to the public.

sightseeing.title: Milos Kleftiko Sea Caves
sightseeing.description: Exploration of the legendary pirate caves accessible only by sea — dramatic white limestone arches rising from turquoise water.

testimonials.quote: The Akrotiri private access alone was worth the entire trip. Standing inside a 3,500-year-old city in complete silence — that does not happen anywhere else in the world.
testimonials.author: P. ANDREOU

testimonials.quote: We have sailed the Mediterranean before, but never like this. The catamaran, the caves, the caldera suite — everything was flawless and completely invisible in its execution.
testimonials.author: L. FONTAINE

tours.name: The High Sierras Elevation
tours.overviewDescription: A rugged yet refined expedition through the vertical landscapes of the American West.
tours.overviewExtended: Stay in architectural lodges that disappear into the rock faces and trek under the purest night skies. This journey marries intense physical exploration with world-class backcountry luxury.

itinerary.title: Ascent to the Lodge
itinerary.description: Helicopter transfer from the valley floor directly to our luxury basecamp.

itinerary.title: Glacier Traverse
itinerary.description: A guided trek across timeless ice formations, ending with a specialized hot-tent dinner.

sightseeing.title: Yosemite Aerial
sightseeing.description: A breathtaking helicopter tour over Half Dome.

testimonials.quote: We felt completely disconnected from civilization but entirely swathed in high luxury.
testimonials.author: M. HARRISON

tours.name: Mediterranean Elegance
tours.overviewDescription: Experience the coastal beauty of the Amalfi Coast combined with exclusive access to private villas and Michelin-starred dining.
tours.overviewExtended: Sail the azure waters on a private yacht, skipping the crowded streets to dock directly at secluded cliffside restaurants. This is the Mediterranean experienced exactly how it was meant to be.

itinerary.title: Capri by Sea
itinerary.description: Sail around the dramatic limestone stacks and anchor for a sunset culinary tasting.

itinerary.title: Positano Heights
itinerary.description: Private car service up the winding cliffs to a secluded villa dinner.

sightseeing.title: Blue Grotto Private
sightseeing.description: Early entry to the legendary cavern.

sightseeing.title: Lemon Grove Tour
sightseeing.description: Exclusive access to historic Sorrento lemon groves with a master distiller.

testimonials.quote: Breathtaking from the moment we stepped onto the yacht.
testimonials.author: D. LORENZO
